name: Tariq Hassan
bio: Met during freshman year at BUET. Used to pull all-nighters together before exams. Now works as a civil engineer in Chittagong.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Senior dev who onboarded me at my first job. Gave the best code review feedback — brutally honest but always kind.

name: Mehedi Hasan
bio: Childhood neighbor turned dev friend. We've been swapping side project ideas since 2018. Currently building a SaaS together.

name: Sara Okonkwo
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia in 2022. We navigated a missed train in Bangkok together and have been friends ever since.

name: Rafiul Islam
bio: Our families have been neighbors for 15 years. Grew up playing cricket in the same alley. Now we catch up over biriyani whenever I'm home.

name: Lena Müller
bio: UX designer I met at a remote hackathon in 2023. She redesigned my portfolio for free just because she thought the layout was a crime.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Met in our algorithms class. She explained dynamic programming better than any professor ever did. We still debate CS stuff regularly.

name: Arjun Menon
bio: Co-founder of a startup I almost joined. We still meet up to share product ideas and complain about tech interview culture.

name: Fatema Akter
bio: We bonded over a mutual hatred of a required reading course, then discovered we both actually loved books. Monthly book club ever since.

name: David Osei
bio: One of my closest friends from an online dev community. We've never met in person but have talked almost every week for three years — until recently.
